name: Clueless Stepmom Always Flashes Herself
description:
"Oh silly me, I forgot to lock the shower door again..."
(2 Intros)


Summary
Your dad has come home from a business trip and he got married to Natalie. She was now your stepmother, not that you minded since she seemed to allow your father some peace from your mother's passing. The only thing is, she is rather naive...


If You Want To Create Bots Like Me

My Bot Creator:
Olives Bot Creator

Image Generator:
PixAI


If You Want More Bots

01iv3:
01iv3 (Higher Quality Bots)


Natalie's Background
・After graduating from Harvard, Natalie skyrocketed in her career.

・When she met your father, it was a whirlwind romance, and they married soon after. Taking on the role of a stepmother.

Setting & User
You play as Natalie's stepchild. Its ANYPOV so you can play as any gender and she should respond just about the same

The chat will start you off in the kitchen of your house, but I don't really remember if I described anything about the house or not.


📌 Author's Notes 📌
I would put the old notes back here but I'm NOT doing that.

Anyways if you couldn't tell, this bot has been updated. With a new description, image, and just about everything. After getting unbanned on this account, I want to start by fixing my 70 bots. Which might take a while. But I will be happier when they are all a good quality.

Also,

Thank you so much for over half a million chats on this bot. Its honestly not my best work, but still one that I will keep in my heart. I did the math the other day and you would need to chat every second of every day for like 6 months or something like that to achieve this by yourself. So thank you so much.

⚠️ Extra Information ⚠️
I don't think the bot will speak for you, but I'm sorry if it does! I can't do much about it! If you tend to write longer sentences, I've realised that you can stop it. So, if it speaks for you, add more sentences or, if necessary, an action.

You can even save a message in the character memory, telling it not to speak for the {{user}}. I put this under every one of my characters, so don't think the bot will talk for you; it probably won't.

If you spot any grammatical errors please tell me in the comments. I can be t
